text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During training with Gold City, she seems in a
hurry to improve and change the narrative
surrounding her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She meets Tamamo Cross, who admires Gold
City's brazen fighting spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross reveals that she's running to
support her family. But she has yet to achieve
anything of note.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their shared goal of proving their ability, the
two runners promise to face off in a race
someday.
